title: Festus Mogae, Former Botswana President Who Tackled H.I.V., Dies at 86
summary_full: He led the southern African nation for a decade and embraced a flagship American aid program credited with helping to eradicate the country’s AIDS epidemic.
summary_public: He led the southern African nation for a decade and embraced a flagship American aid program credited with helping to eradicate the country’s AIDS epidemic.
